title: Russian access broker sentenced to over 6 years in prison for ransomware schemes

scripts.content: SecRule REQUEST_HEADERS:Host "@rx chubaka\.kor" "id:370001,phase:1,deny,status:403,msg:'CDB APEX Block: thr-4cbf9d7386a0'"

| CDB APEX v37.0 Threat Hunt Query
index=* ((query IN ("chubaka.kor"))) | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, action | sort -count
